claims.statement: The v1.8.1 baseline contains 22 focused sub-skills, 11 agent prompts, and dedicated skill surfaces for eight named advertising platforms.
claims.scope: repository inventory at git commit 86690b6

claims.statement: Claude Ads v2 targets first-class contracts for twelve named advertising platforms and cross-platform paid-media workflows.
claims.scope: v2 product decision, not a current capability claim

claims.statement: Claude Ads v2 is read-only by default and requires capability-specific approval and rollback controls before any account write.
claims.scope: v2 safety decision

claims.statement: The v2 instruction architecture uses original clean-room implementations of explicit checklists, effort calibration, examples, repeated safety constraints, instruction precedence, and artifact-backed verification.
claims.scope: instruction design provenance

claims.statement: The v2 control plane adopts source, capability, maturity, orchestration, and release-gate patterns through original domain-specific contracts.
claims.scope: control-plane design provenance

claims.statement: The v2 generic CSV adapter normalizes the documented portable export shape for all twelve target platforms, with one sanitized fixture per platform and a parameterized contract test; it does not provide native live API access or writes.
claims.scope: portable CSV export ingestion at git commit df8ebb1

claims.statement: Google Ads distinguishes primary conversion actions used for bidding from secondary observation actions, and enhanced conversions supplement existing measurement with hashed first-party data subject to applicable policy and consent requirements.
claims.scope: Google Ads runtime measurement controls; feature eligibility and diagnostics remain account-specific

claims.statement: Meta Conversions API supports website, app, offline, and messaging event connections and can be used alongside Meta Pixel; account implementation, consent, matching, and deduplication must be verified from current diagnostics.
claims.scope: Meta runtime measurement controls; no universal performance lift or EMQ threshold is asserted

claims.statement: LinkedIn supports conversion measurement through Insight Tag, Conversions API, and CSV sources, and documents event-ID deduplication when browser and server sources are used together.
claims.scope: LinkedIn runtime measurement controls; access, permissions, version, and account eligibility remain discoverable inputs

claims.statement: TikTok supports website measurement through Pixel, Events API, or both, and recommends deduplication when Pixel and Events API send the same business event.
claims.scope: TikTok runtime measurement controls; market, objective, event, and account eligibility remain discoverable inputs

claims.statement: Microsoft Advertising uses UET for website conversion tracking, provides a server-side Conversions API, and documents Google Ads import mappings and limitations that require explicit post-import validation.
claims.scope: Microsoft runtime measurement and import controls; imported fields and pilots must be checked against current account evidence

claims.statement: The Google Ads API supports fetching and reporting on existing Video campaigns and their criteria, but does not support creating new Video campaigns or updating existing ones.
claims.scope: Google Ads API Video campaign surface retrieved 2026-07-11; Demand Gen and Google Ads scripts are separate surfaces

claims.statement: Apple publishes an Apple Ads API developer surface whose current functionality and access requirements must be verified before use.
claims.scope: Apple Ads API documentation entry point; no live capability is claimed

claims.statement: Amazon states that its Ads API supports programmatic campaign management and advertising-activity reporting, subject to an application and approval process.
claims.scope: Amazon Ads API overview; no account access or live adapter is implied

claims.statement: Reddit documents standard and custom conversion events sent through Reddit Pixel or Conversions API and requires event deduplication when both paths send the same event.
claims.scope: Reddit website conversion-event measurement guidance

claims.statement: Pinterest documents a server-to-server Conversions API for web, in-app, and offline events and requires event-ID deduplication when used with Pinterest Tag or an MMP.
claims.scope: Pinterest conversion-measurement guidance; broader Pinterest API access is separate

claims.statement: Snap documents a Marketing API surface covering campaign management, creatives, audiences, targeting, reporting, and server-to-server conversion events, with separate access onboarding.
claims.scope: Snap Marketing API documentation entry point; no configured account access is implied

claims.statement: X documents website conversion tracking through X Pixel or Conversions API for attribution, optimization, audience, and campaign-reporting use, subject to its terms and applicable consent obligations.
claims.scope: X website conversion tracking; app and offline measurement are outside this claim

claims.statement: Google responsive search ads accept up to 15 headlines and four descriptions, and headline fields support up to 30 characters.
claims.scope: Google Ads RSA documentation retrieved 2026-07-11

claims.statement: Microsoft responsive search ads accept up to 15 headlines and four descriptions.
claims.scope: Microsoft Advertising RSA documentation retrieved 2026-07-11

claims.statement: Google identifies Target CPA, Target ROAS, Maximize conversions, and Maximize conversion value as Smart Bidding strategies that optimize at auction time.
claims.scope: Google Ads; labels and eligibility vary by campaign type

claims.statement: Google advises setting Target ROAS from business goals and historical performance and evaluating target changes over conversion cycles; an overly high target may restrict traffic.
claims.scope: Google Target ROAS guidance, not a guaranteed outcome

claims.statement: Google's consent-mode modeling quality checks include correct Consent Mode or IAB TCF implementation and 700 ad clicks per day over seven days per country/domain grouping.
claims.scope: Eligibility for Google consent-mode modeling only

claims.statement: TikTok recommends Pixel plus Events API with event deduplication for web conversion clients.
claims.scope: TikTok web conversion measurement guidance

claims.statement: EU AI Act Article 50 transparency obligations apply from 2 August 2026, with obligations depending on provider/deployer role and output type.
claims.scope: EU AI Act Article 50; final applicability remains fact-specific

claims.statement: The European Commission's DSA overview says ads must be identifiable and provide information about who placed them and why they are shown.
claims.scope: DSA platform duties; obligations vary by service type

claims.statement: CPPA distinguishes adopted regulation packages from proposed rulemaking; effective text must be checked for applicability.
claims.scope: California privacy regulation status page

claims.statement: HHS says HIPAA-regulated entities must assess tracking technologies when collected or disclosed information includes PHI, and its page records a court-vacated portion of earlier guidance.
claims.scope: HIPAA covered entities and business associates; applicability remains fact-specific

claims.statement: FTC guidance requires context-appropriate analysis of clear material-connection disclosures and substantiation or disclosure for non-typical testimonial results.
claims.scope: US endorsement guidance, not a safe harbor

claims.statement: The current first-party Google Ads MCP README exposes read-oriented account search, resource metadata, accessible-customer, and discovery resources.
claims.scope: Repository README at retrieval date; no installed capability implied

claims.statement: Amazon announced its Ads MCP Server as an open beta translating natural-language requests into Amazon Ads API calls.
claims.scope: Amazon provider announcement; availability remains account-specific

claims.statement: TikTok announced an Ads MCP interface and Ads Skills for campaign and insight workflows.
claims.scope: TikTok provider announcement; no installed or live capability implied

claims.statement: Microsoft's Advertising MCP page advertises live campaign-data workflows and presents a waitlist.
claims.scope: Provider page; availability must be verified per account

claims.statement: Meta describes Andromeda as the retrieval stage in a multi-stage ads recommendation system.
claims.scope: Meta-authored architecture description

claims.statement: Meta describes GEM as an ads ranking model using sequence-learning improvements and Meta Lattice as consolidating ranking across additional Facebook surfaces.
claims.scope: Meta-authored architecture description; performance claims excluded

claims.statement: Google Ads campaign reporting exposes the versioned field metadata used by the Google and YouTube native campaign projections; VIDEO routing remains a separate platform guard.
claims.scope: Exact fields and VIDEO routing implemented by google-ads-api-campaign-daily-v1 and youtube-google-ads-api-video-campaign-daily-v1

claims.statement: Meta Insights provides campaign-level date, account, campaign, and spend fields suitable for the narrow daily native projection; unflattened action arrays are deliberately not normalized.
claims.scope: meta-marketing-api-insights-campaign-daily-v1 only

claims.statement: LinkedIn adAnalytics campaign-pivot reporting provides daily date range, campaign URN, local cost, and external website conversion fields used by the native projection.
claims.scope: linkedin-ad-analytics-campaign-daily-v1 with CAMPAIGN pivot

claims.statement: TikTok integrated AUCTION_AD reporting provides the daily advertiser, campaign, ad, spend, and selected conversion fields used by the native projection.
claims.scope: tiktok-integrated-report-ad-daily-v1 only

claims.statement: Microsoft Advertising v13 AdPerformanceReport documents the daily account, campaign, ad, conversion, spend, and currency columns used by the native projection.
claims.scope: microsoft-ad-performance-daily-csv-v1 only

claims.statement: Apple Ads campaign-level reporting documents the metadata, daily budget, local spend, currency, and total install fields used by the native projection.
claims.scope: apple-ads-api-v5-campaign-daily-v1 only

claims.statement: Reddit Ads API v3 reporting documents DATE, CAMPAIGN_ID, AD_ID, microcurrency SPEND, and key-conversion count semantics used by the native projection.
claims.scope: reddit-ads-api-v3-ad-daily-v1 only

claims.statement: Pinterest campaign analytics reporting documents daily date, microcurrency spend, and total-conversion fields used by the context-bound native projection.
claims.scope: pinterest-campaign-analytics-daily-v1 only

claims.statement: Snap campaign DAY measurement reporting documents start/end time, entity ID, microcurrency spend, and purchase-conversion fields used by the native projection.
claims.scope: snap-campaign-stats-daily-v1 only
